title: La belle de Cadix

actors: Luis Mariano, Carmen Sevilla, Jean Tissier
plot: A French cinema company is shooting a picture requiring real gypsies, so they hire a whole bunch and choose beautiful María Luisa to team with famed singer Carlos Molina. The plot includes a marriage and María Luisa believes it ha...
